info.name: Ariadne Search API
info.description: Postman collection for exercising the Knowledge Base Search API and generating code snippets from ready-made search requests.

request.description: Readiness probe for database-backed API startup.

body.raw:
{
  "query": "абрикос",
  "top_k": 5,
  "filters": {
    "source_types": [],
    "path_prefixes": [],
    "languages": []
  },
  "include_graph_context": false,
  "include_exact": true,
  "include_code": true,
  "include_ocr": true,
  "include_semantic": true,
  "include_image": false
}

request.description: Simple lexical search targeting the indexed apricot markdown document.

body.raw:
{
  "query": "RemovePodsViolatingNodeAffinity",
  "top_k": 5,
  "filters": {
    "source_types": ["code"],
    "path_prefixes": ["/data/knowledge/descheduler_policy_linter_v0351.py"],
    "languages": ["python"]
  },
  "include_graph_context": false,
  "include_exact": true,
  "include_code": true,
  "include_ocr": false,
  "include_semantic": true,
  "include_image": false
}

request.description: Focused code search against the uploaded Python linter.

body.raw:
{
  "query": "pluginConfig",
  "top_k": 5,
  "filters": {
    "source_types": [],
    "path_prefixes": ["/data/knowledge/"],
    "languages": []
  },
  "include_graph_context": false,
  "include_exact": true,
  "include_code": true,
  "include_ocr": true,
  "include_semantic": true,
  "include_image": false
}

request.description: General search request showing how to use path prefix filters.
